data.name: College Gay Sex - Episode 4
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.
Cody’s journey as a gay college student continues with a sizzling double bang, as an ex-lover invites him and Jax to join him and his roommate for a hangout.

GAME DESCRIPTION

EPISODE 4

A blast from the past has recently moved into town and extended an invitation to Cody to reconnect. However, there's a catch: Victor shares the space with a roommate, and Cody doesn't want to feel like a third wheel, so he invites his ever-loyal wingman Jax to join him.

With no other plans for the evening, Jax accepts the invitation, and together they head off to meet Victor and his roommate, hoping for a good time.

Will our college boys have a memorable night out?
Will Victor and Alex welcome their company warmly?
Follow the story and find out!

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
